PrimaryDurationHeading.html.en: Duration of care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms
PrimaryDurationHeading.html._source: Duration of care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms

PrimaryDurationText.html.en: This section asks about the duration of {CmpnName}'s care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms. This includes any primary veterinarians who saw {CmpnName} since the LP/GOLPP symptoms first appeared. It also asks whether you switched primary vets because of how {CmpnName}'s symptoms were being handled.
PrimaryDurationText.html._source: This section asks about the duration of {CmpnName}'s care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms. This includes any primary veterinarians who saw {CmpnName} since the LP/GOLPP symptoms first appeared. It also asks whether you switched primary vets because of how {CmpnName}'s symptoms were being handled.
